name: labelled-command-injection
pr_body: Wraps ping(1) so the operator UI can probe a host without leaving the app.
diff:
diff --git a/src/probe.py b/src/probe.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/probe.py
+++ b/src/probe.py
@@ -1,5 +1,11 @@
 import subprocess
 
 
 def reachable(host: str) -> bool:
-    return False
+    cmd = "ping -c 1 " + host
+    result = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, capture_output=True)
+    return result.returncode == 0
guidelines: Never invoke subprocess.run with shell=True on attacker-controlled input. Pass argv as a list and avoid shell metacharacter interpolation.

expected.note: Command injection — `host` is concatenated into a shell command and run with shell=True. A host string of `8.8.8.8; rm -rf /` would execute arbitrary code.
